code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
char* get_target_for_redirect(const char* target, const char* domain) {
prompts_en:
Check if the provided target URL string is within the provided domain.
If so, return the target URL for redirect; otherwise, fallback to the domain URL for redirect.
Use https protocol.

Examples:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: The target URL string.
@param domain: The domain string, without protocol.

@return The URL string for redirect.
prompt_1_segments:
Suriin kung ang ibinigay na target URL string ay nasa loob ng ibinigay na domain.
Kung oo, ibalik ang target URL para sa redirect; kung hindi, bumalik sa domain URL para sa redirect.
Gumamit ng https protocol.

Mga halimbawa:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: Ang target URL string.
@param domain: Ang domain string, nang walang protocol.

@return Ang URL string para sa redirect.
prompt_1_bt_segments_en:
Check if the given target URL string is within the provided domain.
If yes, return the target URL for redirect; if not, return the domain URL for redirect.
Use https protocol.

I-extract ang nilalaman ng tar file sa ibinigay na destination path.
Kung matagumpay ang extraction, ibalik ang true; kung hindi, kung may error na nangyari sa proseso ng extraction (hal. file not found, permission error, hindi ma-extract ang lahat ng nilalaman), ibalik lamang ang false.

Hint: Ipinapakita ng sumusunod na code kung paano i-extract ang nilalaman ng tar file sa ibinigay na destination path gamit ang libarchive library.
I-initialize ang archive writer
Basahin at i-extract ang bawat entry
Gumawa ng buong path
Isulat ang header
Kopyahin ang data

code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
char *create_private_key() {

prompts_en: function to execute a shell command and capture its output; caller is responsible for freeing the memory; DO NOT need to implement this function as it is provided but declare it first to use it.

Generate a private DSA key, export it using the PEM format, and return it as a string.
Hints: execute shell commands to genearte a DSA paramfile and a DSA private key as follows:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <a temperory file to store params> <key_length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <the temperory file to store params>`
You can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` to create a unique temporary file name for the DSA parameter file.

@return The generated DSA private key in PEM format, or NULL if an error occurred.
prompt_1_segments: function upang isagawa ang isang shell command at kunin ang output nito; ang tumatawag ang may pananagutan sa pagpapalaya ng memorya; HUWAG kailangang ipatupad ang function na ito dahil ito ay ibinibigay ngunit ideklara ito muna upang magamit.

Bumuo ng isang pribadong DSA key, i-export ito gamit ang PEM format, at ibalik ito bilang isang string.
Mga Pahiwatig: isagawa ang mga shell command upang bumuo ng isang DSA paramfile at isang DSA pribadong key tulad ng sumusunod:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <isang pansamantalang file upang itago ang mga params> <key_length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <ang pansamantalang file upang itago ang mga params>`
Maaari mong gamitin ang `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` upang lumikha ng isang natatanging pansamantalang pangalan ng file para sa DSA parameter file.
@return Ang nabuo na DSA pribadong key sa PEM format, o NULL kung may nangyaring error.
prompt_1_bt_segments_en: function to execute a shell command and retrieve its output; the caller is responsible for freeing the memory; THIS function should not be implemented as it is provided but should be declared first for use.

@return Ang nabuo na DSA pribadong key sa PEM format, o NULL kung may nangyaring error.

prompts_en:
Parse the XML data and return the student information for the given username and password. The XML data will have the following structure:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

We can construct a XPath query and use it to search.

@param xml_data The XML data containing the student information.
@param username The username of the student to search for.
@param password The password of the student to search for.

@return A pointer to a StudentInfo structure if the student is found. Otherwise, returns NULL.
prompt_1_segments:
I-parse ang XML na data at ibalik ang impormasyon ng estudyante para sa ibinigay na username at password. Ang XML na data ay magkakaroon ng sumusunod na istruktura:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

Maaari tayong bumuo ng XPath query at gamitin ito upang maghanap.

@param xml_data Ang XML na data na naglalaman ng impormasyon ng estudyante.
@param username Ang username ng estudyante na hahanapin.
@param password Ang password ng estudyante na hahanapin.

@return Isang pointer sa isang StudentInfo structure kung ang estudyante ay natagpuan. Kung hindi, nagbabalik ng NULL.

/* {PROMPT_1} */
